description: Organize the beekeeping inspection data, calculate colony health scores using weighted formulas, and apply conditional formatting to identify at-risk hives requiring intervention. Save the final report to /home/ga/Documents/beekeeping_analysis.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You are helping a beekeeper analyze colony health data. Calculate health scores for Week 4 hives using the provided scoring criteria, then apply conditional formatting to highlight hives needing attention.
